pageStrings.heroDescription: <>Heinsohn Human Global Solutions is the leading company in Payroll and Human Management solutions in the region, with over 45 years of experience transforming how organizations manage their human talent. As part of the Heinsohn business group, we are a technology-based company that combines innovation, deep business knowledge, and regional reach to offer next-generation solutions.

titleLandingHGS.title: Regional presence
titleLandingHGS.description: <>We operate in more than 6 countries in Latin America, providing solutions tailored to local regulations and the specific needs of each market. Our regional expansion positions us as the ideal strategic partner for companies with multinational operations.

titleLandingHGS2.title: Solutions for every type of company
titleLandingHGS2.description: <>We serve both SMEs and large companies with scalable and flexible solutions that adapt to the size, complexity, and sector of each organization. Whether you need to manage 10 or 50,000 employees, we have the perfect solution for you.

titleLandingHGS3.title: Trusted by thousands of customers
titleLandingHGS3.description: <>More than 1,000 clients throughout the region trust us to manage their payroll and human talent operations. Every day, more than 500,000 employees use our services, backed by our robust and reliable technology.

titleLandingHGS4.title: Outsourcing Solutions (BPO)
titleLandingHGS4.description: <>In addition to our technological solutions, we offer specialized Outsourcing services so you can focus on your core business while we take care of the operation:

titleLandingHGS5.title: Contact us
titleLandingHGS5.description: <>today and discover how we can transform your human management with solutions that combine technology, experience, and regional reach.

titleLandingHGS6.title: Strategic alliances with technology leaders
titleLandingHGS6.description: <>We are certified partners of the world's leading technology providers, such as IBM, Microsoft, and other industry leaders. These alliances allow us to integrate the best market technologies into our solutions.

dataTimeLineAlianzas.title: Next-generation solutions
dataTimeLineAlianzas.description: <>Our platforms incorporate emerging technologies such as artificial intelligence, advanced Analytics, process automation, and optimized user experience, ensuring your company has cutting-edge tools

dataTimeLineAlianzas.title: Proven experience
dataTimeLineAlianzas.description: <>With over 40 years in the payroll and human talent management business, we have accumulated deep knowledge of best practices, regulatory challenges, and the changing needs of the labor market.

dataTimeLineAlianzas.title: Private and Public Sector
dataTimeLineAlianzas.description: <>We serve both the private sector and the public sector, with specialized solutions for government entities, pension funds, service companies, retail, manufacturing, and more. Our business vertical solutions ensure each industry receives the specific functionality it needs.

testimonialsSlider.name: Gustavo Alberto Gaviria
testimonialsSlider.text: Heinsohn, as software providers we have had the confidence that the software complies with all legal and company-specific regulations.

testimonialsSlider.name: Camila Peñaliza Lopera
testimonialsSlider.text: Congratulates Heinsohn for the quality of its services, is very happy with the product and with the consultants who assist her.
